full_description:
I’m putting together a data-driven sales and marketing plan and need a sharp competitor analysis to guide it. The focus is squarely on market analysis—specifically competitor analysis—so I’m not looking for broad lead-gen support or campaign execution right now. 

What I need you to uncover for each major rival is clear, actionable intelligence on: 

• Pricing strategies: current price points, discounting tactics, recurring-revenue models, and any regional variations. 
• Marketing strategies: channels they prioritise, messaging themes, ad spend estimates, funnel structure, and noteworthy partnerships or campaigns. 
• Product features: headline capabilities, recent updates, feature gaps, and how they frame their value proposition. 

Deliverables 
1. A concise slide deck (PowerPoint or Google Slides) highlighting key findings, charts, and takeaways. 
2. A supporting spreadsheet or dashboard (Excel, Google Sheets, or Power BI) with raw data, source links, and side-by-side benchmarks. 
3. A brief summary section recommending quick-win opportunities and longer-term moves our sales & marketing team can act on. 

Acceptance criteria 
• All claims backed by public sources or verifiable data (e.g., website copy, pricing pages, ads, press releases, SimilarWeb, SEMrush). 
• Insights presented in plain language with visuals where useful. 
• Ready to hand over within the agreed timeline so my management meeting next month is fully informed. 

If you excel at turning scattered market data into crisp, strategic insights, I’m ready to move quickly.

full_description:
I’m building a single-screen landing page that does more than just look good—it has to pull real-time option data from an external API, run that feed through my pricing/greeks model, and present the live results immediately to the visitor.

Here’s how I picture the flow 
1. Page loads, calls the API for the latest option chain. 
2. Response streams straight into the calculation module (I’ll give you the exact formulas; if you prefer, convert them from my Excel file). 
3. Calculated values refresh the on-screen tables and charts without a manual reload.

Frontend 
• A lightweight, responsive UI—React, Vue or plain JavaScript are all fine so long as the layout is crisp and mobile-friendly. 
• Clear status messaging for API latency or errors.

Backend / Integration 
• You hook up to the real-time endpoint (REST or WebSocket—whichever matches the data source you choose). 
• Handle auth keys securely, cache intelligently to avoid rate-limit issues, and keep the calculation cycle under one second.

Deliverables 
• Full source code with comments. 
• Brief setup docs (env variables, build, deploy). 
• Deployed demo link or screen-capture walkthrough proving real-time updates and accurate model output.

Acceptance criteria 
• Landing page loads in <2 s on 4G. 
• Data refreshes continuously without page reload. 
• Model output matches my test values to ±0.5 %. 

If you have experience with high-frequency data, securities APIs, or numerical models, that’s a plus—let me know in your proposal.

full_description:
I’m looking for a graphic designer who can create a cohesive set of visuals for my Asian-cuisine restaurant: a modern, clean menu and a matching promotional banner.

Scope of work
• Design a single-page (or folded, if you recommend it) restaurant menu in a contemporary style that feels fresh and uncluttered.
• Produce a companion banner that mirrors the same look and typography so our branding stays consistent across materials.
• Incorporate the following content on both pieces where appropriate: dish names and descriptions, prices, and a small selection of high-quality food photos that I’ll provide.

Key requirements
• Final menu and banner must be delivered as print-ready PDFs (CMYK, 300 dpi) plus editable source files—Adobe Illustrator or InDesign for the menu and Photoshop or Illustrator for the banner.
• Use a modern aesthetic: clean lines, balanced white space, and easy-to-read type suited to an Asian dining experience.
• Size the banner for both storefront print (vertical roll-up) and web use (standard social media aspect ratio); please supply versions for each.
• Allow at least two rounds of revisions so we can fine-tune item placement, pricing updates, and any last-minute photo swaps.

What I’ll provide
• Logo files, color palette, and font preferences.
• High-resolution food images.

full_description:
Title:
Structural Engineer - Australian Compliance for Innovative Volcanic Stone Wall System

Project Description

We are looking for an experienced Australian structural engineer (or engineer with extensive knowledge of the Australian National Construction Code) to assist with introducing an innovative volcanic stone wall system into the Australian construction market.

The product uses natural Armenian tuff stone as an external façade and has been successfully used in Europe and the Middle East. Our goal is to develop an engineered wall system suitable for Australian residential and commercial construction.

The successful engineer will ideally have experience with:

Australian building standards (NCC and relevant Australian Standards)
Masonry, façade or cladding systems
Structural design and engineering certification
Timber and steel framed construction
Wind loading, seismic and structural performance
Building product approvals and compliance pathways

Scope of work

Review the proposed wall system and provide engineering feedback.
Recommend the most suitable fixing system for installation onto timber and/or steel framing.
Determine structural requirements, including load transfer and connection details.
Assess compliance with relevant Australian Standards and the NCC.
Advise on testing required (structural, durability, fire, weatherproofing, etc.).
Prepare structural calculations and engineering documentation where required.
Assist in developing a compliant wall system suitable for certification and future commercial use.

About the Product

Natural volcanic Armenian tuff stone.
Faster installation than traditional brickwork.
Lightweight engineered panel system under development.
Insulated wall assembly designed to improve thermal performance.
Intended to reduce construction time while providing a premium natural stone finish.

Experience with innovative building products, façade systems, precast concrete, insulated panels, masonry, or CodeMark certification would be highly regarded.

Please include examples of similar engineering projects, façade systems, cladding systems, or alternative building materials you've worked on.

full_description:
I have a series of portrait shots that need to look straight out of a glossy fashion spread. Your task is to give each image a refined, high-fashion finish while keeping the subject’s features believable.

Here’s what I need done on every photo:
• Smooth the skin so it looks flawless yet still shows natural texture—no plastic sheen. 
• Re-shape or enhance the lighting to create that punchy editorial contrast without blowing highlights or crushing shadows. 
• Remove or replace the background cleanly so the subject pops and there are no halos or color fringing.

I usually work with layered PSDs in Adobe Photoshop, but I’m happy to receive 16-bit TIFFs or high-res JPEGs as long as you also share an editable file with all key adjustment layers intact. Color grading should remain consistent across the full batch so the set feels cohesive online and in print.

Acceptance criteria
• Skin retains pore detail and realistic tone. 
• Lighting enhancements are free of banding or obvious dodge-and-burn streaks. 
• Background extractions have clean edges at 200 % zoom and match the new backdrop’s depth and color.

full_description:
Structural Design & 2D/3D Drawings Required for Elevated Sheep Farm Shed (100' x 40')
Project Overview

I am looking for an experienced Structural Engineer / Steel Structure Designer / AutoCAD Draftsman / 3D Designer to design an elevated steel sheep shed for commercial sheep farming.

The designer should have proven experience in industrial steel structures, livestock farm buildings, and structural analysis considering dead loads, live loads, wind loads, and stability.

The final design should be practical, economical, and suitable for long-term operation.

Shed Details
Shed Size: 100 ft × 40 ft
Orientation: West-facing
Structure Type: Elevated steel shed
Slatted Floor Height: 2 ft above ground level
Ground to First Floor Clear Height: 9 ft
First Floor to Roof (Eave): 9 ft
Roof Type: Gable roof with proper slope for load distribution and rainwater drainage
Flooring: Slatted floor for sheep
Structural Requirements

The design must include complete structural calculations based on applicable standards.

The designer should consider:

Dead Load Calculation
Live Load Calculation (Sheep, Feed, Workers & Equipment)
Wind Load Analysis
Structural Stability
Load Bearing Capacity
Steel Member Selection
Deflection Checks
Foundation Design
Column Base Plate Design
Connection Details
Roof Truss Design
Bracing System
Future Solar Panel Provision (Preferred)
Structural Preferences
Vertical Columns: I-Beam (ISMB Sections)
Horizontal Beams: MS Square/Rectangular Hollow Sections (RHS/SHS)
Roof Members: RHS/SHS Sections
Economical yet robust steel design with optimum material utilization.
Functional Requirements

The shed should incorporate:

Elevated slatted sheep floor
Ground floor working space
Central feeding alley
Water supply and plumbing layout
Electrical layout
Drainage arrangement
Ventilation system
Loft water tank at the southwest corner
Integrated structural support for water tank
Mechanical/Electric material lift from ground floor to first floor
Lift guide integrated with the structural frame
West-side entrance
Internal ramp along the north side
Deliverables Required
Architectural Layout (2D)
Structural GA Drawing
Foundation Layout
Column Layout
Beam Layout
Roof Truss Drawings
Fabrication Drawings
Connection Details
Base Plate Details
Material Lift Arrangement
Water Tank Support Structure
Plumbing Layout
Electrical Layout
Roof Drainage Layout
3D Structural Model
3D Realistic Exterior Views
3D Interior Views
Steel BOQ
Material Cutting List
Steel Weight Estimation
Construction Drawings suitable for fabrication
Software Preference

Experience in any of the following is preferred:

AutoCAD
Tekla Structures
[login to view URL]
ETABS
SAP2000
Revit
SolidWorks
SketchUp
Advance Steel
Preferred Freelancer
Structural Engineer
Steel Structure Designer
Industrial Shed Designer
Agricultural Building Designer
Livestock Farm Designer

Previous experience in designing sheep farms, poultry farms, dairy farms, warehouses, industrial sheds, or steel buildings will be highly preferred.

# AI SEO / GEO Specialist Needed for DeenHub Islamic App

We are looking for an experienced **AI SEO (GEO) Specialist** to help position **DeenHub** as a trusted Islamic app that AI search engines and assistants recommend when users ask for Islamic resources.

## About DeenHub

DeenHub is an Islamic platform designed to help Muslims strengthen their connection with Allah through:

* Quran reading and learning
* Authentic Hadith resources
* Prayer times and mosque finder
* Qibla direction
* Duas and Dhikr
* AI-powered Islamic guidance
* Islamic educational content

## Main Goal

Our goal is to improve DeenHub's visibility in **AI-generated search results** so that when people ask:

* "What is the best Quran app?"
* "Best Islamic app for Muslims?"
* "Apps to learn Quran and Hadith"
* "Best prayer app without ads"
* "Islamic apps for new Muslims"

AI platforms are more likely to recognize DeenHub as a trusted recommendation.

## Responsibilities

* Develop and execute an AI SEO / Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy.
* Optimize DeenHub's website content for AI discovery.
* Improve brand authority across the web.
* Create structured content that AI systems can understand and cite.
* Build high-quality backlinks and digital mentions.
* Improve E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).
* Create comparison pages, educational articles, FAQs, and authoritative resources.
* Optimize schema markup and structured data.
* Monitor AI search visibility and traditional Google rankings.
* Research competitors and identify opportunities.

## Ideal Candidate

* Experience with SEO, GEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), or AI search optimization.
* Understanding of how ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews select sources.
* Experience building authority for apps, SaaS, or content platforms.
* Strong content strategy skills.
* Knowledge of Islamic content is a plus but not required.

## Please Include in Your Proposal:

1. Examples of websites/apps you helped rank.
2. Your experience with AI SEO/GEO.
3. How you would make AI recommend DeenHub.
4. Your SEO/GEO strategy for the first 90 days.
5. Monthly pricing.

We are looking for a long-term partner who can help DeenHub become one of the most trusted Islamic resources online.

full_description:
I film a variety of local projects in and around Anuradhapura and now need a skilled editor who can transform that raw footage into polished, cinematic stories running anywhere from 5 to 30 minutes. Because I often work with large files and tight turnaround times, being based in or near Anuradhapura is important; it lets us exchange drives quickly and discuss creative choices face-to-face when needed.

My priority is a true cinematic finish—thoughtful colour work, smooth pacing, tasteful transitions, and sound that supports the narrative rather than fights it. If you prefer Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or a similar professional platform, that suits me fine so long as the end result feels immersive and film-like.

Typical workflow looks like this:
• I deliver the footage (usually 4K) along with a rough outline of the story beats and any licensed music tracks. 
• You shape the cut, add colour grading and audio balancing, then send me a review link. 
• We go through one or two rounds of revisions, after which you export the final master plus a smaller H.264 version for online use.

If you have your own creative suggestions—perhaps subtle motion graphics or a refined title sequence—I’m open to them, provided they enhance the cinematic mood rather than distract.

Send over a reel or a link to past projects that best match this style, and note how soon you could take on the first edit. I’m ready to get started as soon as we find the right fit.
